name: American Family Fitness Va Center Commons
description: Come play pickleball at American Family Fitness Va Center Commons in Glen Allen, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, food, locker rooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, water, youth programming, and trainers or lessons. The courts can be reserved.
fees:
Members only — Free with Silver Sneakers
Otherwise monthly fee. See AM Fam Fit for details.
